word: H4041 - מְגַמָּה - mᵉgammâh - meg-am-maw' - Sup up

sections.paragraph:
Original: מגמּה

Transliteration: megammâh

Phonetic: meg-am-maw'

BDB Definition:

  1. meaning uncertain; perhaps hordes, accumulation, assembling, eagerness (of Babylonians)

Origin: from the same as H1571

TWOT entry: 361b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
